competitions.title: East vs West 23 MEGATHREAD
competitions.summary: This is the official megathread. All comments are set to display by newest . While the event is happening, make sure to keep the megathread open and constantly refreshed to view and and participate in live discussion from the reddit community. Event Time: April 18, 2026 7:00 PM Local German Time 1:00 PM EST Eastern Standard Time 10:00 AM PST Pacific Standard Time 5:00 PM UTC Coordinated Universal Time 7:00 PM CET Central European Time 10:00 PM GST Gulf Standard Time Purchase PPV : https://live.evwsports.com/ Preliminary Matches These matches will be livestreamed for free on YouTube: Zurab Tavberidze vs Maayan Shterengas Artem “Samson” Oriabinskyi vs Aleksi Zavrashvili Duvan Bornman vs André Nykonenk Main Card Matches Buy the PPV to watch these matches (order of matches might change): Riekerd Bornman vs Lars Rørbakken Ayane Takenaka vs Melek Sahin Rustam Babaiev vs Betkili Oniani Aymeric Pradines vs Matt Mask Egle Vaitkute vs Azra Sari Artyom Morozov vs Alizhan Muratov Mindaugas Tarasaitis vs Artur Makarov Davit Samushia vs Oleksandr “Manifestor” Telyatnik Dave Chaffee vs Ivan Matyushenko Brian Shaw vs Leonidas Arkona Devon Larratt vs Vitaly Laletin https://preview.redd.it/7l25hfolevvg1.png?width=1440&format=png&auto=webp&s=adbec93dfe4ff1d266bad394fdc248486d6442d4 submitted by /u/minhale [link] [comments]
